resolvedQuestions.summary: Public CLI is IPC-only (SPECKIT_BACKEND_ONLY); socket 0o600, DB dir 0o700; admin direct-DB separate; trust model identical to MCP stdio.
All 37 tool schemas CLI-mappable; ~20 flat-flags, ~10 array-flags, ~7 need --json escape hatch; codegen from TOOL_DEFINITIONS feasible by construction.
Bootstrap lock + owner lease + respawn lock triple hierarchy prevents all race vectors. Design delta: add dual-spawn test and --session-id flag.
Exit codes: 0/1/64/69/75. Retryable (-32001, cold-start, recycle) → 75. Terminal (protocol mismatch, EPERM, no owner) → 69. Replayable/unsafe taxonomy in session proxy.
Cold path: 1-5s (no embedder) to 30-60s (cold embedder). Design delta: add --timeout-ms, document cold-start expectations.
Measured: ~40ms Node start on darwin/arm64. Per-call ~50-60ms warm, validates 50-150ms estimate.
Session ID via --session-id→resolveSessionTrackingId; sticky correlation in context server; runtime-agnostic flag.
Launcher build-check per spawn; bootstrap lock serializes; session proxy protocol-version mismatch → fail-closed exit 69.
Multi-client bridge test-proven; daemon serializes writes; design delta: add dual-client concurrent test.
10-13 engineering days center estimate (8-10 day implementation + 2-3 day risk deltas). Excludes OpenCode tools: block upstream + ~125-ref migration.
macOS sun_path near 104-char limit; use SPECKIT_IPC_SOCKET_DIR override to shorter path. Windows is non-goal.
Protocol-version-drift on build swap → session proxy detects mismatch → exit 69 → client reinvokes with fresh handshake.

keyFindings.title: Public CLI path is provably IPC-only
TOOL_DEFINITIONS contains all 37 tools with JSON Schema inputSchemas
~20 tools map to flat flags, ~10 need array flags, ~7 need --json escape
Owner lease prevents concurrent daemons via exclusive write + re-read verification
Bootstrap lock serializes ALL concurrent launcher starts (mkdir-based, 120s timeout, 300s stale)
Respawn lock prevents concurrent respawns with full lease re-verification
Orphan cleanup via lastKnownDescendantPids snapshot + process-tree reap
Heartbeat self-shutdown on lease failure prevents stale ownership
Session proxy classifies replayable vs unsafe tools, replays safe-only on recycle
Node per-call overhead measured: ~40ms cold start on darwin/arm64
Session ID resolved from args.sessionId → transport metadata → CODEX_THREAD_ID → fallback
Launcher artifactsReady() checks dist on every spawn
Session proxy protocol-version drift → fail-closed exit 69
